headline: Nasdaq (NDAQ) Stock May Be 7% Above Fair Value Following Treasury Infrastructure Partnership
summary: Nasdaq stock has delivered a strong 87.5% total return over the past three years. Current checks point to a company that does not clearly stand out as cheap, with the intrinsic value estimate from the Excess Returns model suggesting the shares are roughly in line with fair value, while earnings based multiples lean more expensive. Nasdaq's 87.5% three year return signals investors have already priced in a sizeable improvement in the business and its prospects. Recent headlines around the SK...
